title: Camau i wneud eich hawliad
claimingParagraph: [W] If you are claiming on your own, or for one person, you do not need to complete Section 2 ('Other people in your claim').
claimingWithOthersText: [W] If you are claiming with others, complete the claim sections with your details. The tribunal only needs basic personal details about other people in your claim (Section 2). We do not need their claim details.

section2.title: [W] Other people in your claim
section2.link1Text: [W] Add another claimant to your group claim
section2.link3Text: [W] Claiming on your own or with others

section3.title: Manylion cyflogaeth a manylion yr Atebydd

section4.title: Manylion yr hawliad
section4.link2Text: Dywedwch wrthym beth yr ydych eisiau ei gael gan eich hawliad
